_note: 試合スタッツ（API-Football自動取得 / Sofascore相当）。各試合ID(GS1..GS72 や koは home|away)にオブジェクトを割当。lineupsは {formation, players:[{no,name,pos,grid,rating}]}（gridは 'row:col'）。例: {"GS1":{"possession":[58,42],"shots":[15,8],"shotsOnTarget":[6,3],"goals":[{"player":"Gimenez","team":"メキシコ","minute":23}],"cards":[{"player":"Foster","team":"南アフリカ","minute":40,"type":"Y"}],"lineups":{"home":{"formation":"4-3-3","players":[{"no":9,"name":"Gimenez","pos":"F","grid":"4:2","rating":7.8}]},"away":{"formation":"4-2-3-1","players":[]}},"subs":{"home":[{"minute":70,"in":"Vega","out":"Gimenez","rating":6.9}],"away":[]}}}
